name: Html.Form.Input.Suggest.External
comment:
This module implements an input that includes input suggestions coming from an external source,
such as an HTTP request.

# The input field
@docs Suggestions, extSuggFormVal, ExtSuggestiveInput, extSuggestiveTextInput

unions.comment: An action to be applied to a form value for components with internal state

aliases.name: Element
aliases.comment: All inputs will be defined by this basic structure

aliases.name: FormElement

aliases.name: FormValue
